notes: Operational hub consolidating manual-only tails from four near-complete hubs: admin-ui-revamp, github-copilot-rollout, client-z-index-sweep, design-system-enforcement.
Parent hubs are closable once their agent-doable work lands; rows migrate here only after the parent's agent tail has merged (Decision 4 in plan.todo.md).
The agent's role on this hub is post-hoc verification via gh api / PostHog API / locale grep — not execution. Human operator (Afo) owns completion.
.plans/ is durable repo truth; status.json history[] carries each verification probe command + snippet as evidence.

ui.handoff_note: No UI code changes. Chrome MCP spot-checks live in qa_pass_1 instead.

state_api.handoff_note: No data-layer changes. The only repo change originating here is the native es/pt translator pass inside packages/shared/src/i18n/.

qa_pass_1.handoff_note: Runs after each Afo-completed manual item. Invokes the matching gh api / PostHog / locale probe in the same turn and records the command + output snippet in status.json history[].

qa_pass_2.handoff_note: Starts once qa_pass_1 has green-checked every AC. Sweeps each parent hub's plan.todo.md + status.json and confirms migrated rows are struck and cross-linked.

history.note: Hub created to consolidate manual-only tails from admin-ui-revamp (PostHog dashboards D54, native es/pt translation D56), github-copilot-rollout (rulesets, premium budget, security toggles, 2-week metrics review). client-z-index-sweep and design-system-enforcement have no rows here — their tails are agent-closable via Chrome MCP on the parent hub.
